title: Electronic publishing
body: Electronic publishing, also known as e-publishing, digital publishing, or online publishing, includes the digital publication of e-books, digital magazines, and the development of digital libraries and catalogues. It also includes the editing of books, journals, and magazines for reading on a screen (computer, e-reader, tablet, or smartphone).
